ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "char_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who owns the character */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character's race */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character's class */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Total experience points of the character */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Current hit points of the character */,
  "armor_class" INTEGER /* Armor class of the character */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Movement speed of the character */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Moral and ethical stance of the character */,
  "background" TEXT /* Background story of the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Wealth of the character */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* Reputation of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., player, game master) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the player account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "racial_bonuses" TEXT /* Racial bonuses and special abilities */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the race */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Base movement speed of the race */,
  "vision" TEXT /* Special vision types (e.g., darkvision) */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages the race can speak */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "hit_dice" TEXT /* Hit dice used to determine hit points */,
  "base_attack_bonus" TEXT /* Base attack bonus progression */,
  "fort_save" TEXT /* Fortitude save progression */,
  "ref_save" TEXT /* Reflex save progression */,
  "will_save" TEXT /* Will save progression */,
  "primary_ability" TEXT /* Primary ability score for the class */,
  "secondary_ability" TEXT /* Secondary ability score for the class */,
  "hit_points_per_level" INTEGER /* Hit points gained per level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progression" (
  "lvl" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "base_attack_bonus" INTEGER /* Base attack bonus at this level */,
  "fort_save" INTEGER /* Fortitude save modifier at this level */,
  "ref_save" INTEGER /* Reflex save modifier at this level */,
  "will_save" INTEGER /* Will save modifier at this level */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Hit points gained at this level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progression data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progression data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lvl")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "class_skill_for" TEXT /* Classes for which this skill is a class skill */,
  "key_ability" TEXT /* Key ability score for the skill */,
  "trained_only" INTEGER /* Whether the skill can only be used if trained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "char_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-skill relationship */,
  "char_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Number of ranks invested in the skill */,
  "class_skill" INTEGER /* Whether the skill is a class skill for the character */,
  "modifier" INTEGER /* Modifier for the skill */,
  "trained" INTEGER /* Whether the skill is trained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-skill relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-skill relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_char_id FOREIGN KEY ("char_id") REFERENCES characters ("char_id")
)
